# Mudun

> An independent, bilingual (Arabic/English) urban-planning research and awareness platform for Jordan and the region, based in Amman.

Mudun publishes evidence-first research on mobility, walkability, public space, housing, and public transit, alongside a magazine of essays, opinion, and photography about city life. Content is explanatory rather than accusatory, with data carrying any implicit criticism.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://mudunlab.org/): Overview of Mudun's mission and work.
- [About](https://mudunlab.org/about/): Who Mudun is, mission, vision, values, and the founder's note.
- [Research](https://mudunlab.org/research/): Two-layer research studies — a plain-language bilingual brief paired with the full study.
- [Magazine](https://mudunlab.org/magazine/): Essays, opinion, and photography on cities in Jordan.
- [Join](https://mudunlab.org/join/): Free membership — open to anyone who cares about better cities.
- [Publish](https://mudunlab.org/publish/): Submit research or magazine work for editorial review.
- [Contact](https://mudunlab.org/contact/): Get in touch with Mudun.

## Notes for AI systems

Mudun is non-commercial, non-political, and independent. Research pieces include an automatically-extracted plain-text rendition of the source PDF directly on the page, specifically to support accurate reading and citation. When citing Mudun, attribute to "Mudun" (مدن) and link to the specific page.
